description: Vital Recorder 1.16.6 is open on the Windows desktop in Track mode with the file '0001.vital' from the VitalDB open dataset loaded. The track window shows multiple waveform traces from a noncardiac surgery at Seoul National University Hospital, including arterial pressure (ART, red), ECG leads (ECG_II, ECG_V5, green), pulse oximetry (PLETH, light blue), capnography (CO2, yellow), and airway pressure (AWP, white). Switch the display from Track mode to Monitor mode.
